title: cleyera orbicularis
intro: Cleyera orbicularis, also known as the Cleyera or Panama Hat Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleyera orbicularis include its potential to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cleyera orbicularis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil.
